title: Incorrect DELETE due to the one-pass optimization
key_bug_features: DELETE statement affected by one-pass optimization
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(y INT NOT NULL, z TEXT DEFAULT 'default');
DELETE FROM t2 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM t2 AS v WHERE v.y=t2.y-1);
CREATE TABLE t3(a REAL, b INTEGER, c TEXT);
